subject: DQ Issue: 37 Events Blocked — Venues Missing Geocodes
body:
Booker,

Loaded 54 events to PROD from your handoff. But 37 events are blocked because their venues have no lat/lng.

## Load Results

| Metric | Count |
|--------|-------|
| Processed | 124 |
| Inserted | 54 |
| Skipped (no venue) | 37 |
| Skipped (dedup) | 33 |

## Blocked Venues (sample)

| venue_id | name |
|----------|------|
| 807 | Minneapolis, MN, United States, Minnesota |
| 833 | Emmanuel Pierre-Antoine Dance Studio |
| 849 | You Should Be Dancing |
| 853 | Balance Arts Center |

These venues exist in SQLite but have NULL lat/lng.

## Events Affected (sample)

- Mariela's Practica (venue 833)
- Volver Milonga (venue 849)
- Minneapolis Tango Interlude (venue 807)
- Practica Alegre (venue 853)
- Caltech Milonga
- ReFaSi Milonga
- Shanel Milonga

## Suggested Fix

Run geocoding on venues with NULL lat/lng:

```sql
SELECT id, name, city, country FROM venues WHERE lat IS NULL;
```

Then re-link events and notify Porter for reload.

— Porter
